title: Imperial Communique 2734.19g
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{CorrectTitle|title=Imperial Communique #2734.19g|reason=#}}
'''Imperial Communique #2734.19g''' detailed the defection of [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] units on [[Wazta/Legends|Wazta]].

The [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] member [[General/Legends|General]] [[Nasda]] referenced this communique and cited that various Imperial Navy vessels and their crews had deserted afterwards, which alongside the results of the Battle of Yavin, made more recruitments necessary and yet at the same time they had to make sure any new recruits were not Rebel sympathizers.
